---
name: Experiment / feature proposal
about: Propose a new experiment, strategy, disease type, or analysis
title: "[proposal] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Question / hypothesis**
What scientific question does this answer, and what do you expect to find?

**What varies**
Which comparison axis changes (model / strategy / layers / region / seed)?
Everything else must stay fixed (see [`docs/METHODOLOGY.md`](../docs/METHODOLOGY.md)).

**References**
Papers backing the idea (add to `docs/literature-review.md` when merged).

**Relation to the roadmap**
Does this map to an item in [`docs/RESEARCH-ROADMAP.md`](../docs/RESEARCH-ROADMAP.md)?
